entries.title: plan(w10): Engineering hygiene docs and tracker discipline

evidence.note: Defines the W10 gate contract, evidence map discipline, stale artifact triage, and rollback flow.
Maps workstream issues to concrete evidence paths so strategy text is not treated as proof.
Covers happy-path, negative, stale, and onboarding validation behavior for the hygiene gates.

entries.title: task(w10-t01): Add lint typecheck format and release-context CI gates

evidence.note: Runs lint, typecheck, format, release-context, and docs validation before the heavier validation suite.
Validates the repo-owned lint contract without adding a new dependency.
Checks changed text files for CRLF, trailing whitespace, and missing final newline.
Rejects local artifacts, environment files, logs, packaged outputs, and secret-like filenames in release context.

entries.title: task(w10-t02): Refresh docs specs and API inventory for runtime truth

evidence.note: The canonical route inventory remains the runtime truth source and is covered by API route inventory tests.
The product spec links route truth to the canonical inventory.
Ensures every app API route appears in the inventory with exact HTTP methods.

entries.title: task(w10-t03): Build issue-to-evidence map and stale artifact reconciliation

evidence.note: Requires every W10 issue to cite existing evidence paths and explicit blockers when blocked.
Contains the evidence map validator and release-context stale artifact checks.
Covers missing evidence path and blocked-without-blocker regressions.

entries.title: task(w10-t04): Triage stale branches PRs and worktree hygiene

evidence.note: Reports stale branches, stale PRs, dirty worktrees, and missing worktrees without deleting or closing anything.
Keeps cleanup and merge discipline anchored to the existing parallel worktree runbook.
Covers stale branch/PR and dirty worktree detection.

entries.title: task(w10-t05): Improve developer onboarding and first-run validation

evidence.note: Reports first-run readiness for Node, dependencies, access key, database mode, and required repo files.
Documents the first-run validation command and release-quality gate ladder.
Covers supported and unsupported first-run readiness cases.
